# thoth_pack_assignment (Resource)

Applies a compliance pack to a specific agent and tracks assignment state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) Target agent ID.
- `pack_id` (String) Compliance pack identifier.

### Optional

- `approval_policy_id` (String) Approval policy ID for pack application.
- `critical_threshold` (Number) Force at least STEP_UP when normalized risk meets/exceeds this threshold (0-1).
- `delegation_boost` (Number) Deterministic boost for delegation risk signals (0-100).
- `environment` (String) Environment: dev or prod.
- `mismatch_boost` (Number) Deterministic boost for purpose/sensitivity mismatch signals (0-100).
- `overrides_json` (String) Pack override JSON object.
- `trust_floor` (Number) Ignore low-confidence purpose/delegation signals below this floor (0-1).

### Read-Only

- `applied_at` (String) Apply timestamp.
- `applied_by` (String) Principal that applied the pack.
- `id` (String) Resource ID (agent_id/pack_id).
- `regulation` (String) Regulation family for applied pack.
- `revoked_at` (String) Revoke timestamp when assignment is removed.
- `rule_version` (Number) Rule version applied by enforcer.
- `status` (String) Current assignment status.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
